about.title: About the AVGC-XR Portal
about.subtitle: A Government of Tamil Nadu initiative to grow the state's Animation, Visual Effects, Gaming, Comics, and Extended Reality industry.
about.intro: The Tamil Nadu AVGC-XR Portal is a centralized digital platform for seamless interaction between Government departments, AVGC-XR industry stakeholders, academic institutions, startups, freelancers, and beneficiaries.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: To position Tamil Nadu as a global hub for the AVGC-XR industry — driving employment, innovation, and creative exports from the state.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To enable policy dissemination, stakeholder engagement, application processing, incentive management, and performance monitoring through a modern, mobile-friendly, AI-first digital platform.

elcot.title: About ELCOT
elcot.content: Electronics Corporation of Tamil Nadu Limited (ELCOT) is a wholly owned Public Sector Undertaking of the Government of Tamil Nadu, established in 1977. ELCOT serves as the Optional Procurement agency of the Government of Tamil Nadu for IT-related products and leads the State's digital infrastructure initiatives.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Reach out to the ELCOT AVGC-XR team for support, partnerships, or queries.

office.title: ELCOT Headquarters
office.address: 9th Floor, Sigapi Achi Building, 18/3 Rukmani Lakshmipathy Road, Egmore, Chennai – 600 008
office.hours: Monday – Friday, 10:00 AM to 5:30 PM IST

form.title: Send us a message
form.name: Full name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Thank you. Your message has been recorded. We'll respond within 2 business days.
form.error: We couldn't send your message. Please try again or email us directly.

helpdesk.title: Helpdesk
helpdesk.description: For application support, scheme queries, and technical issues.

grievance.title: Grievance Redressal
grievance.description: If you have a grievance regarding any application or portal service, please raise it through the Grievance module.

footer.aboutText: The Tamil Nadu AVGC-XR Portal is a flagship initiative of the Government of Tamil Nadu, implemented by ELCOT, to grow the state's creative economy.
footer.address: 9th Floor, Sigapi Achi Building, 18/3 Rukmani Lakshmipathy Road, Egmore, Chennai – 600 008
